title: New Tools
description: Adds 20 New Tool recipes made out of 4 new materials: Resin, Amethyst, Sea stuff and Sculk
body:
*** [Remember to download the **REQUIRED** **resourcepack**] ***

Adds **20** **New** **Tools**, made out of 4 new materials: 
- Resin
- Amethyst
- Sea Stuff
- Sculk

![All 20 New Tools and the materials theyre made of](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/636462db75e5204e055365812bdb6d1be7ed3317.png)

These Tools have **special abilities**
![Player Hoovering is cursor over item Amethyst sword showing what abilities this item has](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ccae1ea903ac10abf679c9451326f472929b09f.png)

They're crafted in an odd way, but don't worry, you will have all recipes unlocked already.
![How to craft a Resin Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ee6e752958e10c7e3e0caa71c8bda3ac1a5549e.png)
